stories.headline: Putin highlights multipolar world with no single hegemon as Russia-China ties strengthen

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: I know this isn’t sexy news… but this is actually pretty huge.. 🚨 Secretary Brooke Rollins just gave a China the Middle Finger and announced three quick historic actions to RESTART and expand U.S. fertilizer manufacturing in the United States

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇷🇺 "A multipolar world means no hegemons. Even with giants like India and China, no single nation should dominate global politics. Everyone must be equal." — Putin

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: This isn't AI, it's the Huajiang Canyon Bridge in Guizhou, China, the world's highest bridge at 625 meters above the river beneath it.

stories.headline: Senate advances resolution limiting military action against Iran without Congress approval

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Today is May 20, 2026 and Donald J. Trump is the President of the United States of America. And Tom Massie is packing his bags.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Let there be no mistake: the United States stands squarely in support of Bolivia's legitimate constitutional government. We will not allow criminals and drug traffickers to overthrow democratically elected leaders in our hemisphere.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: BREAKING: In a major blow to Donald Trump, the Senate voted 50-47 to advance a resolution to limit military action against Iran unless approved by Congress. Republicans who voted yes: • Cassidy • Collins • Murkowski • Paul Only Democrat to vote no: • Fetterman

stories.headline: FBI charges former US Attorney with stealing confidential Trump probe documents

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 This afternoon, a former managing assistant U.S. Attorney who supported Jack Smith’s politicized investigation of President Trump has been charged with stealing the confidential investigation documents. Carmen Lineberger allegedly emailed the confidential material to her own personal email, disguising them as dessert recipes to conceal them from record searches. Lineberger is charged with four felony counts in the indictment. This FBI will not hesitate to bring to account those who violated the trust of the American public in an investigation that should’ve never been brought to begin with.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: I strongly disagree with the push for a constitutional amendment to bar foreign-born legislators. https://www.foxnews.com/politics/mace-targets-squad-dem-proposed-constitutional-ban-foreign-born-lawmakers While I have suggested the possible https://jonathanturley.org/2026/04/06/the-28th-amendment-is-it-time-for-a-new-amendment-on-the-meaning-of-citizenship/ I cannot think of anything more antithetical to our founding than barring foreign-born citizens from Congress. As a nation of immigrants, it is a reaffirmation of our heritage to have these citizens serve in government...

stories.headline: NVIDIA reports Q1 earnings beating estimates with strong revenue and guidance.
stories.body:

• Revenue $81.6B vs Est. $79.2B
• EPS $1.85 vs Est. $1.78
• Data Center $75.2B vs Est. $73.5B
• Gross Margin 75% vs. Est. 75%

Q2 Guidance
• Revenue $90.6B vs Est. $87.2B
• Gross Margin 75% vs. Est. 75%

stories.headline: First trailer for ‘ROLLING LOUD’ film starring Owen Wilson, Matt Rife and Travis Scott released.
stories.body:
First trailer for ‘ROLLING LOUD’, starring Owen Wilson, Matt Rife and Travis Scott.

The film follows an overprotective father who attempts to bond with his son by sneaking him into the Rolling Loud music festival.

In theaters on October 2.

stories.headline: Korean soybean noodle soup recipe shared in response to request
stories.body:
일본 트친의 요청으로 만드는 콩국수 레시피!
아울러 한국 사람도 콩국수 먹고 싶은데 늦은 시간 파는데 없을때 야매 콩국수 만드는 법.
준비물: 두부 1모, 두유 1팩, 땅콩버터 1스푼, 설탕 반 스푼, 소금 반 스푼, 얼음 2개.
만드는 법: 위에 준비물 다 믹서기에 넣고 갈기.
끝!
*땅콩버터 없을 땐 참깨 두 스푼으로 대체.

コングクスが食べたい！でも遅い時間で店が開いてない時の「超簡単ヤミツキ・コングクス」の作り方。

【準備するもの】
豆腐：1丁
豆乳：1パック
ピーナッツバター：スプーン1杯
砂糖：スプーン半分
塩：スプーン半分
氷：2個

【作り方】上の材料をすべてミキサーに入れて混ぜるだけ。 以上！
※ピーナッツバターがない時は、すりごま大さじ2杯で代用OK！

stories.headline: GitHub reports investigation into unauthorized access to internal repositories via poisoned VS Code extension.
stories.body: We are investigating unauthorized access to GitHub’s internal repositories. While we currently have no evidence of impact to customer information stored outside of GitHub’s internal repositories (such as our customers’ enterprises, organizations, and repositories), we are closely monitoring our infrastructure for follow-on activity.

stories.headline: Psyche spacecraft swings by Mars for speed boost en route to asteroid
stories.body:
First stop, Mars. Next stop, Psyche 📍

On May 15, our Psyche spacecraft swung by Mars on its way to its next destination: a metal-rich asteroid also named Psyche. The Red Planet gave the spacecraft a 1,000-mph speed boost and provided some stunning photos as well!

stories.headline: Governor Newsom secures FEMA grant for BainFire suppression in Southern California
stories.body:
California just secured an additional Fire Management Assistance Grant from @FEMA to guarantee critical resources for suppressing the #BainFire in Riverside County.

As crews continue to work around the clock in Southern California, follow emergency guidance from local officials.

stories.headline: Multiple large wildfires continue to threaten Southern California amid evacuations
stories.body: Fueled by gusting winds and warm temperatures, multiple large wildfires continued to menace Southern California on Wednesday, prompting thousands of residents to evacuate, authorities said. https://abcnews.com/US/multiple-large-wildfires-menacing-southern-california-prompting-thousands/story?id=133145470&cid=social_twitter_abcn

stories.headline: More than 17,000 under evacuation orders as Southern California wildfire threatens homes
stories.body:
More than 17,000 people were under evacuation orders in Southern California on Tuesday as a wildfire threatened suburban homes.

The wind-driven Sandy Fire was reported Monday in the hills above Simi Valley about 30 miles northwest of Los Angeles.
